languages.original_text: "No offence, Cass, but this is a familiar smell and atmosphere to us ordinary servants of the dynasty. You should be used to it by now if you want to live in the real world..."

languages.text: "Не обижайся, Кас, но это привычный для нас, рядовых слуг династии, запах и атмосфера. Тебе бы уже пора привыкнуть, если хочешь жить в реальности..."
languages.translation_comment: The characters came to medbay after the Rogue Trader allowed the use of augmentations on the bodies of commoners.

languages.text: "No offence, Cass, but this is a familiar smell and atmosphere to us ordinary servants of the dynasty. You should be used to it by now if you want to live in the real world..."
languages.original_text: "Не обижайся, Кас, но это привычный для нас, рядовых слуг династии, запах и атмосфера. Тебе бы уже пора привыкнуть, если хочешь жить в реальности..."

"No offence, Cass, but this is a familiar smell and atmosphere to us ordinary servants of the dynasty. You should be used to it by now if you want to live in the real world..."
"No offence, Cass, but this is a familiar smell and atmosphere to us ordinary servants of the dynasty. You should be used to it by now if you want to live in the real world..."

languages.text: 「失礼ですが、キャス、この匂い、この雰囲気は、王朝に仕える私たち庶民には、馴染みがあります。もしあなたが現実の世界で生きていたいのなら、もう慣れているはずです…」
languages.original_text: "No offence, Cass, but this is a familiar smell and atmosphere to us ordinary servants of the dynasty. You should be used to it by now if you want to live in the real world..."

traits.locale_text: 「失礼ですが、キャス、この匂い、この雰囲気は、王朝に仕える私たち庶民には、馴染みがあります。もしあなたが現実の世界で生きていたいのなら、もう慣れているはずです…」

languages.text: « Sans vouloir vous vexer, Cass, les serviteurs ordinaires de la dynastie ont l'habitude de cette odeur et de cette atmosphère. Vous allez devoir vous y faire si vous voulez vivre dans le monde réel... »
languages.original_text: "No offence, Cass, but this is a familiar smell and atmosphere to us ordinary servants of the dynasty. You should be used to it by now if you want to live in the real world..."

traits.locale_text: « Sans vouloir vous vexer, Cass, les serviteurs ordinaires de la dynastie ont l'habitude de cette odeur et de cette atmosphère. Vous allez devoir vous y faire si vous voulez vivre dans le monde réel... »

languages.text: "Nichts für ungut, Cass, aber für uns einfache Diener der Dynastie ist das ein vertrauter Geruch. Ihr solltet Euch langsam daran gewöhnen, wenn Ihr in der realen Welt leben wollt ..."
languages.original_text: "No offence, Cass, but this is a familiar smell and atmosphere to us ordinary servants of the dynasty. You should be used to it by now if you want to live in the real world..."

traits.locale_text: "Nichts für ungut, Cass, aber für uns einfache Diener der Dynastie ist das ein vertrauter Geruch. Ihr solltet Euch langsam daran gewöhnen, wenn Ihr in der realen Welt leben wollt ..."

languages.text: "Alınma Cass ama bu koku ve atmosfer, biz hanedanlığın sıradan hizmetkârlarına tanıdık. Gerçek dünyada yaşamak istiyorsan şimdiye dek buna alışmış olman gerekirdi..."
languages.original_text: "No offence, Cass, but this is a familiar smell and atmosphere to us ordinary servants of the dynasty. You should be used to it by now if you want to live in the real world..."

traits.locale_text: "Alınma Cass ama bu koku ve atmosfer, biz hanedanlığın sıradan hizmetkârlarına tanıdık. Gerçek dünyada yaşamak istiyorsan şimdiye dek buna alışmış olman gerekirdi..."

languages.text: «No se ofenda, Cass, pero este olor y este ambiente nos resultan más familiares a los siervos más humildes de la dinastía. A estas alturas ya debería ir acostumbrándose si quiere vivir en el mundo real...».
languages.original_text: "No offence, Cass, but this is a familiar smell and atmosphere to us ordinary servants of the dynasty. You should be used to it by now if you want to live in the real world..."

traits.locale_text: «No se ofenda, Cass, pero este olor y este ambiente nos resultan más familiares a los siervos más humildes de la dinastía. A estas alturas ya debería ir acostumbrándose si quiere vivir en el mundo real...».

languages.text: “别见怪，小卡。这种气味和氛围，我们这些王朝的普通仆从早就习以为常了。若想活在现实世界里，你也该适应了……”
languages.original_text: "No offence, Cass, but this is a familiar smell and atmosphere to us ordinary servants of the dynasty. You should be used to it by now if you want to live in the real world..."

traits.locale_text: “别见怪，小卡。这种气味和氛围，我们这些王朝的普通仆从早就习以为常了。若想活在现实世界里，你也该适应了……”
